quiz.question: Why did Raju's parents leave him at home?
options: They visited Raju's grandmother because she was sick
They went to buy more chickens

quiz.question: What was Raju selling?
What did Raju dream of doing with the money from selling the eggs?
options: Going to the fair, enjoying games, and buying a toy car

quiz.question: What happened while Raju was daydreaming?
options: He tripped over a stone and all the eggs broke

quiz.question: What is the moral of Raju's story?
options: Do not build castles in the air before your plans become real
Selling eggs is the best business
Dreaming is more important than working

quiz.question: Why was Bhavika unhappy at the beginning of the story?
options: She did not like going to school
She could not walk and had no friends

quiz.question: Who did Bhavika help near the school bench?
What gift did the mother pigeon give Bhavika?
options: A pair of magical golden shoes

quiz.question: What happened when Bhavika wore the magical shoes?
options: She could walk, run, and won the sports race

quiz.question: What is the moral of the story?
options: Helping others brings kindness and good things in return
Winning races is the most important thing

stories.title: ಯಾರು ಪ್ರಶಸ್ತಿ ಸ್ವೀಕರಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ | Who Wins Prize

quiz.question: What special food did the mother hen decide to make for Jackie and Johnny?
Which child helped the mother hen with the cake?
Why did Johnny receive the bigger piece of cake?
options: He helped his mother prepare the cake

quiz.question: What did Jackie realize after seeing Johnny's reward?
options: He should help with household work
He should ask for more cake
He should buy his own cake

quiz.question: What is the moral of the story?
options: Hard work and helping others are rewarded
Cake should be shared equally every time

quiz.question: Why did Jayanta set the old ox Kallu free?
options: Kallu wanted to leave the farm
Kallu had become old and could no longer work well

quiz.question: Where did Kallu decide to live after being set free?
options: In a cave near grass and a river
At the top of a mountain

quiz.question: How did Kallu scare the lion away the first time?
options: He chased the lion with his horns
He pretended there was a huge animal inside waiting to eat the lion
He asked other animals for help

quiz.question: What did the fox do after the lion ran away?
options: It convinced the lion to return with it

quiz.question: What is the moral of the story?
options: Strength is more important than intelligence
Use intelligence and stay calm when facing difficulties

stories.title: Iruve Mattu Midate | ಇರುವೆ ಮತ್ತು ಮಿಡತೆ

quiz.question: What was the ant doing before the rainy season?
What did the grasshopper do while the ant was working?
options: Played around and made fun of the ant

quiz.question: What happened when the rainy season arrived?
options: The grasshopper had plenty of food
The ant ran out of food
The grasshopper could not find food and became hungry

quiz.question: How did the ant respond when the hungry grasshopper asked for help?
options: The ant shared its stored food
The ant chased the grasshopper away
The ant asked the grasshopper to leave the forest

quiz.question: What is the moral of the story?
options: Work hard, plan ahead, and save for the future

stories.title: ಎರಡು ತಲೆಯ ಹಕ್ಕಿ | Two Headed Bird

quiz.question: Why did the animals make fun of the two-headed bird?
options: It had two heads sharing one body
It was afraid of other birds

quiz.question: Why did one head refuse to share the tasty fruit with the other head?
options: It wanted to save it for later
It believed only it deserved to enjoy the taste

quiz.question: What did the second head do to get revenge?
options: It asked other birds for help

quiz.question: What happened after the second head ate the poisonous fruit?
options: Only the second head became sick
The entire bird died because both heads shared one body

quiz.question: What is the moral of the story?
options: Unity and cooperation are important because selfishness hurts everyone
Never eat fruit from the forest
Being different is always a disadvantage
